name: Almond Shortbread Biscuits (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Cream the butter in a mixing bowl.
4. Sift together the flour and cornflour, then add the ground almonds and caster sugar to the butter.
5. Work the ingredients together with your hands until well combined.
6. Turn out onto a very lightly floured surface and finish kneading until the dough is smooth.
7. Roll the dough into two rounds, each about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Prick the dough well with a fork and divide each round into six triangles.
9. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet.
10. Bake for about 25-30 minutes, or until lightly golden.
11. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
12. Place on a wire rack to finish cooling.
